name: Proxy Setup Guide + Custom Prompts (For Openrouter & JanitorLLM)
description:
People will tell you to "Use a Proxy for free," but they will never tell you exactly how. So, I made this guide for all of you! Since I'm not a gatekeeper, I like to share the little knowledge I have, even though I'm a bit confused by it myself. I tried to make it easy to understand for all of you.

PS: I will be slow to update this guide from time to time, and the

Use a Proxy for a better experience with a bot, especially if it has a high amount of tokens, which causes the bot to lose memory quickly. Some Proxy Models work better than others, though. Just follow this & paste it in your "Proxy API Configurations" Section:

~

Guide:

Configuration Name: (Put in a nickname or something of your choice, or just put the name of the Proxy model you're using)

Model: nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free

Proxy URL: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions

API Key: (Follow the steps below)

Step 1: Go here (Make sure to create an account first, or u won't be able to make a key):

Gemma 4 31B (free)

Step 2: Scroll down & click on "Create API Key". It will pull up your "Api keys", so then click on "Create" again at the top right corner (If you lose your key, you can simply create another the same way)

Step 3: Name your Api key (Don't touch anything else), then click on "Create", & then click on the little clipboard next to your Api key to copy your key, and paste it into your Api Key section in your "Proxy API Configurations." Remember to save it & refresh your page.
creator: XDAXDOUX
